case_title: CACH, LLC VS. JOSHUA KALVEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200032163)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KALVEN, JOSHUA DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-08-2019
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-01-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT - CONDITIONAL (TRANSACTION ID # 200003631) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-24-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100041056), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC SERVED NOV-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KALVEN, JOSHUA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR FEB-01-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE DEC-24-2019 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
